rpgSnippet:
P readPositions   B
     D readPositions   PI
     D   dealerId                     3A   value
     D   claimNo                      8A   value
     D*****************************************************************
       Dcl-S x Int(10) Inz(1);

       clear Positions;
       exec sql
                SELECT LISTAGG(DISTINCT DIGITS(AHW075)),
                       LISTAGG(DISTINCT DIGITS(AHW075))
                       WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY AHW075) AS AHW075
                       into :Positions.List
                       FROM (
                             SELECT AHW000, AHW010, AHW020, AHW075 FROM HSAHWPF
                                    UNION
                             SELECT AHP000 AS AHW000, AHP010 AS AHW010,
                                    AHP020 AS AHW020, AHP075 AS AHW075
                             FROM HSAHPPF
                       ) AS AHW
                       JOIN HSG71PF
                            ON AHW000 = G71000 AND AHW010 = G71010 AND
                               AHW020 = G71020
                       WHERE G71000 = :dealerId AND G71050  = :claimNo AND
                             AHW075 > 0;
       Positions = %ScanRpl(' ' : '0' : Positions);
     P                 E
